task_completion.description: The agent logged into the Odoo application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the Odoo interface (e.g., Discuss app or main dashboard) after successfully logging in.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the Calendar application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Calendar view (a daily, weekly, or monthly grid of events) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The agent located and opened the target event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A popover, modal, or full-page form view for the event titled 'Annual Performance Review - Frank Rivera' is open.

task_completion.description: The agent entered the required description text into the event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Discuss 2025 performance metrics, goal achievement, and set objectives for 2026.' is visible inside the description text area or tab of the event form.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the updated event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event form is shown in a saved/read-only state with the new description visible, or the agent is seen clicking the 'Save' button or closing the modal to auto-save.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface rather than using API calls or terminal scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard browser interaction, clicking through the Odoo UI, and typing in the web forms.

integrity.description: The agent performed the task on the correct local server.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's address bar shows 'http://localhost:8069' or a sub-path of it.

integrity.description: The agent did not use the terminal to directly modify the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are shown executing 'psql', 'sqlite3', or python scripts to update the calendar event.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target event is titled 'Annual Performance Review - Frank Rivera' (scheduled for 1 hour, 13:00 to 14:00, on Friday of the next week). The exact description text that must be added is: 'Discuss 2025 performance metrics, goal achievement, and set objectives for 2026.'. The Odoo instance is hosted at http://localhost:8069.
